default_creds.context: no -u flag in default kdb+ start

misconfig_patterns: No -u flag in default kdb+ start — q prompt accessible without credentials
REST API at :8082 open by default — /api/tables enumerates all tables
High-value target: finance/quant deployments, tick data + vector search

active_probe.false_positive_check: kdb+ q protocol on :5000 is binary IPC — REST :8082 is the HTTP surface; port 5000 alone is very high FP

deployment_tells: kdb+ IPC on :5000 — binary protocol, telnet reveals .z.vs version without auth
REST endpoint :8082 /api/tables returns table list without auth
Finance/quant pattern: colocated with time-series data
pivot_paths: kdb+ IPC → tables with vector columns (.ml. namespace, embedpy)
sources: [CONFIRMED — NuClide Cat-02 survey 2026-06-05; live population observed]
